hero.title: Reserve your seat
hero.subtitle: Travel between cities quickly and easily

booking.title: Search
booking.validation: Please select departure city, destination city and date.
booking.step2Hint: Leave empty if you do not want a return ticket.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Book a ticket in just a few minutes with three simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter your departure city and destination, then select your travel date.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Pick a departure and number of seats, optionally add a return ticket, and confirm your booking.
howItWorks.step3Desc: You receive an email confirmation with a booking reference and a link to manage your reservation.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Everything you need for a comfortable and worry-free journey — in one place.
services.s1Desc: Find a departure and reserve a seat in just a few steps — no calls, no waiting at the counter.
services.s2Desc: Book your outbound and return at once, or add a return ticket later via the link in your email confirmation.
services.s3Desc: Cancel or change the date yourself, via the link in your email confirmation — up to 24 hours before departure.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Our mission is to modernize and simplify intercity transport in Serbia and the region. We believe everyone deserves a fast, reliable, and accessible way to reach their destination. Through innovative technology, a user-oriented approach and collaboration with reliable carriers, we make travel a simple experience.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How can I book a ticket?
faq.a1: Fill in the booking form with your route, date and number of seats, click "Book" and your ticket will be registered.
faq.q2: Do I need an account to make a reservation?
faq.a2: No account is needed. Just fill in the details in the form and complete your reservation.
faq.q3: Can I cancel or change my reservation?
faq.a3: Yes. Through the link in your email confirmation you can cancel your reservation or change the departure date yourself, up to 24 hours before departure.
faq.q4: How and where can I pay for my ticket?
faq.a4: Payment is made on the bus. Depending on the carrier, you can pay by cash or card.

aboutUs.heroSubtitle: UhvatiBus connects passengers with bus carriers across Serbia — search, book, and manage your ticket all in one place.
aboutUs.storyP1: Our vision is to encourage the growth of public transport in Serbia through this service. Our mission is to give passengers an online service where they can handle everything before a trip — from planning the route to reserving a seat.
aboutUs.storyP2: UhvatiBus was born from everyday experience. As someone who often travels by bus across Serbia, the founder always wondered why there was no simple platform to find a departure, reserve a seat, and get an email confirmation in just a few steps. That frustration became the idea.
aboutUs.storyP3: Today UhvatiBus offers route search, booking in a few steps, round-trip tickets, automatic email confirmation, and the ability to cancel or change your reservation date yourself. All from one place, with no calls or waiting at the counter.
aboutUs.missionP1: We believe road transport in Serbia is ready to step into the internet era. We strive for a perfectly balanced formula of accumulated knowledge and the possibilities modern technology offers.
aboutUs.missionP2: The goal is clear — to open the doors of our virtual platforms and place reliable carriers on them, so that together we build a connected, well-coordinated public transport system serving every passenger.
aboutUs.v1Desc: By working only with verified carriers, we ensure your journey goes smoothly.
aboutUs.v2Desc: Our platform is designed to make booking fast and intuitive — no hidden steps.
aboutUs.v3Desc: Clear departure information, real-time seat availability, and full control over your reservation.
aboutUs.teamSubtitle: One person, one idea, one goal
aboutUs.m1Desc: A web developer with over 4 years of experience. As a frequent bus traveler across Serbia, he noticed there was no simple platform for booking tickets — so he decided to build one himself.
aboutUs.m2Desc: Marija leads platform development, ensuring a reliable and secure system for all users.
aboutUs.m3Desc: Nikola coordinates collaboration with carriers and ensures every journey runs on time.
aboutUs.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of satisfied users and book your ticket today.

forCompanies.heroSubtitle: UhvatiBus is a platform for carriers who want to sell tickets online, manage departures and track occupancy — no paperwork, no hassle.
forCompanies.howSubtitle: Four simple steps to running your transport digitally
forCompanies.s1Desc: Fill in the registration form with your company name, email and password. Verify your account and get instant access to the dashboard.
forCompanies.s2Desc: Create the routes you offer — each line connects two cities. You can have as many lines as you need.
forCompanies.s3Desc: Add individual or multiple departures at once. The platform automatically prevents schedule overlaps on the same line.
forCompanies.s4Desc: Passengers book seats directly online and receive an email confirmation. You see all bookings in real time in your dashboard.
forCompanies.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to run your transport professionally
forCompanies.f1Desc: Create routes between cities and add distance and average travel time. Each line lives independently — easy to add or remove.
forCompanies.f2Desc: Add a single departure or create repeating schedules — for example, every day or on weekdays at the same time. Save hours of admin work.
forCompanies.f3Desc: Seats are assigned automatically at the time of booking. No double-selling, no overlaps — the system handles it.
forCompanies.f4Desc: Every passenger instantly receives an email with their booking reference, departure details, and a cancellation link. You send nothing manually.
forCompanies.f5Desc: For each departure you see the complete passenger list — name, email, number of seats and booking date. Everything in one place.
forCompanies.f6Desc: Track occupancy by line, seats sold this month, and upcoming departures with visual fill indicators. Make better business decisions based on real data.
forCompanies.benefitsSubtitle: What sets us apart from paper records and improvised spreadsheets
forCompanies.b1: No double-selling — seats are blocked in real time
forCompanies.b3: Schedule multiple departures at once to save time
forCompanies.b4: Occupancy statistics by line and month
forCompanies.b5: Prevention of schedule overlaps on the same line
forCompanies.b7: Works on all devices — phone, tablet, desktop
forCompanies.b9: Quick setup — get started in under 5 minutes
forCompanies.ctaSubtitle: Register your company, add your first line, and schedule departures today. Free.

footer.aboutText: We help you easily and efficiently book your services through our system.
